channel.title: Vedic Astrology on Vinayak Hora
channel.description: Recent content in Vedic Astrology on Vinayak Hora

item.title: Natonnata Bala Made Simple: A Planet's Day–Night Strength (and Why Two Programs Disagree)
item.description: A plain-language guide to Natonnata Bala — the day/night strength in Shadbala — worked out step by step on a real example chart, and a look at why Vinayak Hora and Jagannatha Hora report different values.
